model: deepseek-v4-pro sharded review with deepseek-v4-flash synthesis

The inventory records that tools/workbench-server.mjs is API-only by default while legacy desktop.html/mobile.html/workbench.js/styles.css/projection-source.js/favicon.svg remain explicit fallback and acceptance-gate dependencies. LFG-P6.1 is closed; LFG-P6.2 remains blocked until Next.js served-route gates replace legacy static browser-event, frontend-acceptance, and scheduler writeback gates.

notes: DeepSeek inventory, plan/static-route, server/browser-events, frontend-acceptance/shell, and server-test shards all returned PASS and synthesis returned PASS.
